headline: Occidental Petroleum or Chevron: Which Oil Stock Offers More Upside?
summary: OXY's stronger ROE, cheaper valuation, earnings estimate growth and six-month share gains give it an edge over CVX.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Occidental Petroleum, Lowers Price Target to $68
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Devin McDermott   maintains Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $74 to $68.
